posts.text: BREAKING: The Iranian negotiating delegation has left the negotiation venue in Switzerland in "protest" over President Trump's threats, per Iranian state media. Iran calls the threats a violation of the June 18th Memorandum of Understanding which bars the use of threat or force.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
